briefs.title: Council to approve commemorative plaque for Burnaby Lake Overpass opening April 2026
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on approving the official wording for a commemorative plaque marking the opening of the Burnaby Lake Overpass, a pedestrian and cyclist bridge over Highway 1 linking Burnaby Lake and Deer Lake.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Lake Overpass official opening date
